authors: Saara-Maija Kallio Jenni Mäenpää Faculty of Information Technology and Communication Sciences
raw_title: Visuality as an Affordance on Instagram News Production
title_en: Visuality as an Affordance on Instagram News Production
title_zh: 视觉性作为Instagram新闻生产中的可供性
plain_summary_zh: 这篇研究探讨了Instagram平台如何通过其视觉特性影响新闻生产。研究者分析了视觉元素在新闻制作中的作用，以及平台功能如何塑造新闻内容的形式和传播方式。
plain_summary_en: This research examines how Instagram's visual features influence news production. The study analyzes the role of visual elements in news creation and how platform functionalities shape the form and dissemination of news content.
research_direction_zh: 数字新闻学中社交媒体平台对新闻生产实践的影响研究，特别关注视觉传播和平台可供性理论的应用。
research_direction_en: Research on the impact of social media platforms on news production practices in digital journalism, with particular focus on visual communication and the application of affordance theory.
